upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samit tAn vftrahA'KidatKe arA~ iva KedayA' (f॰8.77.3) samaKidat=samayunak saMyuktAn aDAt
'aTa ha prARa uccikramizyantsa yaTA suhayaH zaqvISaSakUn saNKidedevamitarAn prARAn samaKidat' (CAM॰u॰5.1.12) saNKidet=udDaret
'tvA yujA ni KidatsUryasyendraScakram' (f0 4282) avADAt avAkfkzat avAkzipat
